subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Grandeur in this darksome night maketh mention of His leaves and handmaidens, that through the fragrances of remembrance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان عظمت در این لیله دلماء اوراق و اماء خود را ذکر میفرماید تا بنفحات ذکر
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @suffering and imprisonment, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
